meta.title: Hire Me — kalandra.tech
meta.description: Send Pavel Kalandra a job offer directly through this form.

hero.title: Hire Me
hero.subtitle: Have an exciting opportunity? Send me a job offer directly through this form.

loginPrompt.title: Authentication Required
loginPrompt.description: Please sign in to submit a job offer. This helps me respond to real inquiries.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell me about the role, team, and what makes it exciting...
form.additionalNotesPlaceholder: Anything else you'd like to share...
form.attachmentsHint: Up to 5 files, 15 MB total. PDF, Word, Excel, images, or text.
form.attachmentsError: Failed to upload files. Please try again.
form.successMessage: Thank you for your interest. I'll review your offer and get back to you.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
